## CommandDescriptor.inputSchema property

Zod schema for the command's input. Drives: - CLI: each top-level field becomes a Commander flag. - MCP: passed through as the tool's input schema. - SDK: parsed at the boundary before invoking `handler`<!-- -->.

The generic constraint `z.AnyZodObject` enforces an object schema at the type level — top-level fields are what map to CLI flags / MCP tool properties. Add `.describe("…")` to each field so the description flows to both CLI help and the MCP schema.

**Signature:**

```typescript
inputSchema: TSchema;
```
